# HiTech Globals — Agentic AI & Digital Solutions Studio

> HiTech Globals is a remote-first AI & Digital studio specializing in Agentic AI, custom web development, mobile apps, and UI/UX design.

## About
HiTech Globals (hitechglobals.com) is a remote-first digital solutions studio.
We build exceptional digital products for ambitious businesses worldwide.
Our team specializes in Agentic AI development, autonomous agent workflows, custom LLM integrations, web applications, mobile apps, and premium UI/UX design.

## Services
- Agentic AI Development (Custom LLM Integration, AI Automation Workflows, NLP, Predictive Analytics, AI Chatbots)
- UI/UX Design (User Research, Wireframing, Visual Design, Design Systems, Responsive, WCAG)
- Web Development (Custom Web Apps, React & Next.js, PWAs, API Integration, Performance, SEO)
- Mobile Development (iOS & Android, React Native, Flutter, App Store Deployment)
- E-commerce Solutions (Shopify, Custom E-commerce, Payment Integration, Analytics)
- Web Design (Landing Pages, Corporate, Portfolios, Blog Sites)
- Brand Identity (Logo Design, Brand Strategy, Visual Identity, Style Guides)
